s-1.ptxt: REMOVE REAR DISC BRAKE CALIPER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Remove the bolt and separate the flexible hose from the shock absorber.
Remove the 2 bolts and separate the rear disc brake caliper assembly.

atten3.ptxt: Use wire or an equivalent tool to keep the brake caliper from hanging down by the flexible hose.

s2.ptxt: Release the parking brake and place the matchmarks on the rear disc and the axle hub.

atten4.ptxt: If the disc cannot be removed easily, turn the shoe adjuster until the wheel turns freely.

s2.ptxt: Temporarily install the 2 nuts and washers to the rear axle hub bolt as shown in the illustration.
Using SST and a brass bar or an equivalent tool to hold the hub and bearing assembly, remove the rear axle hub bolt.
Install a washer and nut to a new bolt as shown in the illustration.
Using a brass bar or an equivalent tool to hold the hub and bearing assembly, install the rear axle hub bolt by tightening the nut.
Aligning the matchmarks, install the rear disc.

atten4.ptxt: When replacing the rear disc with a new one, select the installation position where the rear disc has the minimum runout.

s-1.ptxt: INSTALL REAR DISC BRAKE CALIPER ASSEMBLY

s2.ptxt: Install the rear disc brake caliper with the 2 bolts.

atten3.ptxt: Do not twist the brake hose when installing the rear disc brake caliper assembly LH.

s2.ptxt: Install the rear flexible hose with the bolt.
